name: pi-subagents-tmux
description: Pi extension for delegating work to project or user agents, including persistent tmux subagent panes.

settings.label: Enable subagents
settings.description: Register the subagent tool, /agents command, and persistent pane polling.

settings.label: Max parallel tasks
settings.description: Maximum number of tasks accepted in one parallel subagent call.

settings.label: Max concurrency
settings.description: Maximum number of one-shot subagent processes to run at the same time.

settings.label: Show subagent dashboard
settings.description: Render a persistent subagent activity card above the editor with active/completed agents, pane ids, bridge state, summaries, and artifact hints.

settings.label: Quiet inline output with dashboard
settings.description: When the dashboard is enabled, keep chat/tool transcript rows to short event crumbs and move details into the persistent dashboard/Ctrl+O views.

settings.label: Dashboard max items
settings.description: Maximum subagent rows shown in the persistent dashboard.

settings.label: Dashboard collapsed by default
settings.description: Show fewer dashboard rows and hide summaries by default.

settings.label: Dashboard display shortcut
settings.description: Keyboard shortcut that cycles the subagent dashboard through hidden → compact → normal → expanded → hidden. Use none to disable.

settings.label: Agents popup shortcut
settings.description: Keyboard shortcut that opens the full /agents subagent browser popup. Use none to disable.

settings.label: Tree connector style
settings.description: Connector glyphs for subagent result rows. Unicode is prettier; ASCII uses |--/`-- for maximum terminal compatibility.

settings.label: Collapsed item count
settings.description: Number of recent text/tool items shown in collapsed subagent results.

settings.label: Truncate subagent results
settings.description: Apply Pi-sized inline caps to subagent tool output and details, with full-output preservation when enabled.

settings.label: Result max bytes
settings.description: Maximum inline bytes kept for each subagent result before truncation.

settings.label: Result max lines
settings.description: Maximum inline lines kept for each subagent result before truncation.

settings.label: Preserve full subagent output
settings.description: Write oversized full subagent output to the session runtime and include the artifact path in tool results.

settings.label: Completion poll interval
settings.description: Parent-session polling interval for persistent pane completion files.

settings.label: Child inbox poll interval
settings.description: Child-pane polling interval for incoming persistent pane task files.

settings.label: Force session bridge for panes
settings.description: Explicitly load pi-session-bridge in new persistent pane launchers so steer_subagent can target panes even when settings drift.

resources.name: subagent
resources.description: Delegate tasks to isolated Pi subagents.

resources.name: get_subagent_result
resources.description: Retrieve persistent pane subagent task results by taskId or latest agent task.

resources.name: steer_subagent
resources.description: Steer a live persistent pane subagent through pi-session-bridge or queue a fallback steering note.

resources.name: /agents
resources.description: List, inspect, and manage subagent panes.
